description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on pull requests, pushes, and published releases. Use a matrix job strategy to build with different compilers (gcc, clang), configurations (Release, Debug), and Linux images (ubuntu-20.04, ubuntu-22.04). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up ccache, install dependencies, configure the build with CMake, compile dependencies and the OSP-Magnum project, run unit tests with ctest, and upload the build artifact.
